Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-14-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly for a default prove-up hearing in Dept. 218. Com. Sue Kaplan; Clerks R. Edwards/M. Chin; CRS Tony Vaughn; Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared on behalf of plaintiff who was not present.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendants: Simon & Simon Medical Equipment Company, Inc and Gayle J. Simon as follows:
Principal $41,374.84
Interest $1,880.78
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $342.50
for a total of $46,138.12
Plaintiff to get immediate possession of property

Judgment signed in open court.
